recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Foul Play
recommendations.overview: A shy San Francisco librarian and a bumbling cop fall in love as they solve a crime involving albinos, dwarves, and the Catholic Church.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.

recommendations.title: 10 Days of a Bad Man
recommendations.overview: Battered, broken and bereaved, a private investigator must muscle his way through a tangle of lies to uncover the truth behind a mansion murder.

recommendations.title: The Big Sleep
recommendations.overview: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.

recommendations.title: Crooked House
recommendations.overview: A private investigator helps a former flame solve the murder of her wealthy grandfather, who lived in a sprawling estate surrounded by his idiosyncratic family.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.

recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.
